log_text: HMI froze, recovered on restart. recipe download failed checksum on the cooling tower fan.
resolution: Reloaded matching driver, tag quality good, documented firmware rev.

log_text: pressure tx span out of trim on the main compressor.
resolution: Re-zeroed and trimmed span, loop verified against reference.

log_text: pressure tx span out of trim at the conveyor head pulley.
resolution: Re-trimmed load cell span, weight readback matched test weights.

log_text: audible growl at 1480 rpm. NDE bearing vibration up to 8.5 mm/s RMS on the cooling tower fan.
resolution: Swapped DE bearing and seal, aligned coupling, retested ok.

resolution: Recalibrated transmitter, updated cal record, within tolerance.

log_text: vibration band 2x line freq elevated. rumble at the drive end on the palletizer.
resolution: Replaced bearing, re-greased to spec, vibration back to 7.0 mm/s.

log_text: DE bearing running hot at 73C. axial play felt by hand on extruder 1.
resolution: Swapped DE bearing and seal, aligned coupling, retested ok.

resolution: Recalibrated transmitter, updated cal record, within tolerance.

log_text: axial play felt by hand. NDE bearing vibration up to 4.2 mm/s RMS on the palletizer.
resolution: Swapped DE bearing and seal, aligned coupling, retested ok.

log_text: encoder signal dropping, drive faults on the packaging line.
resolution: Swapped heater element, verified current draw balanced.

log_text: At the reactor feed: grease line blocked to bearing.
resolution: Topped up oil, traced and fixed seal weep, logged for reseal.

log_text: metal flake in grease purge at the reactor feed.
resolution: Repacked grease, monitored temp, scheduled bearing change at next PM.

log_text: On the packaging line: alarm flood from a single stuck bit.
resolution: Forced step to advance, patched logic for missing flag, retested batch.

log_text: On line 4 drive: gearbox oil level below min on sight glass.
resolution: Refilled and reset auto-luber, verified grease delivery at the point.

log_text: oil dark and overdue for change on pump skid 4.
resolution: Cleared blocked grease line, purged bearing, confirmed flow.

log_text: At the conveyor head pulley: gearbox oil level below min on sight glass.
resolution: Cleared blocked grease line, purged bearing, confirmed flow.

log_text: On the packaging line: HMI froze, recovered on restart.
resolution: Reloaded matching driver, tag quality good, documented firmware rev.

log_text: At the conveyor head pulley: bearing noise rises under load.
resolution: Repacked grease, monitored temp, scheduled bearing change at next PM.

log_text: SCADA tag quality bad on 7 points. batch sequence stuck on step 7 on line 6 drive.
resolution: Reloaded matching driver, tag quality good, documented firmware rev.

log_text: water ingress in sump, oil milky. oil temp high, viscosity dropping on the packaging line.
resolution: Refilled and reset auto-luber, verified grease delivery at the point.

log_text: NDE bearing vibration up to 5.5 mm/s RMS at the conveyor head pulley.
resolution: Replaced bearing, re-greased to spec, vibration back to 10.3 mm/s.

log_text: In the utilities building: OPC server lost connection intermittently.
resolution: Reloaded matching driver, tag quality good, documented firmware rev.

log_text: audible growl at 2950 rpm in the mixing area.
resolution: Pressed in new bearing, checked fit and clearance, returned to service.

log_text: weep at output seal. gearbox oil level below min on sight glass on extruder 1.
resolution: Cleared blocked grease line, purged bearing, confirmed flow.

log_text: On the palletizer: grease line blocked to bearing.
resolution: Cleared blocked grease line, purged bearing, confirmed flow.

log_text: On the palletizer: temp RTD showing 4C offset vs handheld.
resolution: Re-trimmed load cell span, weight readback matched test weights.

log_text: On the main compressor: metal flake in grease purge.
resolution: Repacked grease, monitored temp, scheduled bearing change at next PM.

log_text: pH probe slow and offset. level reading creeping vs manual dip on extruder 6.
resolution: Recalibrated transmitter, updated cal record, within tolerance.

log_text: At the reactor feed: pH probe slow and offset.
resolution: Re-trimmed load cell span, weight readback matched test weights.
